<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band04_chunk006.pdf#page=14 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band04 p276 -->

ZELL

<!-- header: ZEL -->


[[File:Band04_chunk006_p014_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band04_chunk006_p014_img002.jpg|thumb]]


A<sub>4</sub> Augustinus


[[File:Band04_chunk006_p014_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band04_chunk006_p014_img004.jpg|thumb]]


A Hieronymu


[[File:Band04_chunk006_p014_img005.jpg|thumb|A, Gregor]]


3 Mariä Verkündigung
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band04 p277 -->
